---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# StreamingDataModule { #json2vec.StreamingDataModule }

```python
StreamingDataModule(
    model,
    root,
    suffix,
    train=None,
    validate=None,
    test=None,
    predict=None,
    preprocessor=None,
    num_workers=None,
    persistent_workers=True,
    pin_memory=True,
    sharding=ShardingStrategy.file,
    chunk_batch_size=4096,
    file_buffer_size=1,
    observation_buffer_size=1,
    sample_rate=1.0,
    replacement=None,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Lightning data module for streaming records from files.

Reads file-backed records, applies an optional preprocessor, batches
observations, and encodes them with model hyperparameters.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [train_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.train_dataloader) |  |
| [val_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.val_dataloader) |  |
| [test_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.test_dataloader) |  |
| [predict_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.predict_dataloader) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.dataloader) |  |

### dataloader { #json2vec.StreamingDataModule.dataloader }

```python
dataloader(strata, required=True)
```
